title: [v4.1] play kube log tag handling
body:
This is an automated cherry-pick of #14121

/assign mheon

```release-note
Fixed a bug where the `--log-opt` option to the `podman play kube` command could cause Podman to panic.
```

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mheon*, *openshift-cherrypick-robot* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/v4.1/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

OK, this isn't going to work without https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/14163 also being merged... Going to close.

The cherry-pick strategy does not appear to be yielding success. We can discuss further on Monday.
